# SL-META-010: description-length-outside-guidance

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Meta description length is outside configured guidance.

## Metadata

- Category: Title and metadata (title-metadata)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: heuristic
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- raw-html
- rendered-dom

- policy-threshold

## When This Triggers

Compare normalized description length with non-blocking policy thresholds.

## False Positives

This rule is heuristic. Treat the diagnostic as a review prompt and use DSL
severity overrides or suppressions when project policy intentionally differs.

## How To Fix

Review description length for search result readability; this is never a hard
error.
